runtime.serverCommand: ENCRYPTION_KEY='track9-probe-key' API_HOST=127.0.0.1 API_PORT=3901 DATABASE_URL='file:prisma/dev.db' npm run start:api

probes.title: Indexer create/update/test contract realism including definition-aware behavior

runtime.command: curl POST /api/indexers (invalid object settings + valid string settings) and POST /api/indexers/:id/test
runtime.observedOutput: Object settings rejected with INTERNAL_ERROR 500; valid create succeeds (201) but persists encrypted settings payload; Cardigann test fails with Definition not found.

probes.title: TV metadata search parity vs Sonarr baseline

runtime.observedOutput: Route returns INTERNAL_ERROR 500 with upstream message 'Failed to search series: 404'.

probes.title: Movie metadata search when TMDB key is missing

runtime.command: curl POST /api/media/search {term:'inception', mediaType:'MOVIE'} + probe MetadataProvider URL construction
runtime.observedOutput: Movie search returns INTERNAL_ERROR 500 with TMDB invalid key. Runtime probe shows fallback URL uses api_key=demo when key is missing.

probes.title: Movie metadata search URL behavior when TMDB key is configured

runtime.command: Runtime MetadataProvider probe with configured tmdbApiKey and deterministic fetch response
runtime.observedOutput: Configured-key URL path is generated correctly, but live API still fails when key is invalid and no key-validation health gate exists.

probes.title: Release search/grab side effects: queue handoff and activity events

runtime.observedOutput: Release search fails with definition wiring error, but direct release grab succeeds and produces queue + activity side effects.

probes.title: Subtitle variant operation contract and variant scoping

runtime.command: curl POST /api/subtitles/search and /api/subtitles/download for missing identifiers and multi-variant movie scope
runtime.observedOutput: Missing identifier validation returns 422, but multi-variant ambiguity surfaces as INTERNAL_ERROR 500 rather than normalized validation envelope.
